name: The house ran at your word

props.ChoiceTitle: The house ran at your word
props.ChoiceText: For a season, kitchens, accounts, keys, stables, and schedules all bent toward one voice, and it was yours.
props.ChoiceBio: When the house ran at your word, you learned how thoroughly private power can shape a world without ever sitting on a throne.

0.TransitionText: Because the house running at your word taught you how thoroughly private power can shape a world without ever sitting on a throne, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A whole chain of servants, suppliers, and dependents still acts as though your favor orders the day.
1.TransitionText: Because the house running at your word taught you how thoroughly private power can shape a world without ever sitting on a throne, household authority remained your daily craft.

0.TargetText: Someone now treats your recommendation within a great house as if it were a title in itself.
